_comment: Human-verified resolutions of cross-source team conflicts. Each entry signs off on one player: `team` is the verified-correct bbref team. crosscheck.py treats a conflict as reconciled (not a gate-blocking flag) when the player is listed here. If `team` matches the BBR snapshot, our data is already correct (ESPN was stale); if it matches ESPN, the snapshot is WRONG and needs correcting — crosscheck will flag that loudly. `basis`: 'verified' = explicitly confirmed; 'trust-bbr-unverified' = blanket sign-off trusting our published source, not individually checked (revisit if a source correction surfaces).

accepted.note: AD is on Washington this season — BBR is correct, ESPN is stale.
ESPN says CLE; trusting BBR, not individually verified.
